note: Capability families are a learner-neutral comparison layer. Membership indicates topical overlap, not grade equivalence or proof that an assessment measures every mapped capability.

jlpt.note: Direct coverage is limited to the JLPT scored domains: language knowledge, reading, and listening. Speaking, interaction, and writing may support performance but are not directly tested.
jlpt.noteJa: 直接対象は、JLPTの採点領域である言語知識・読解・聴解に限ります。発話、やり取り、作文は成績を支える場合がありますが、直接は測定されません。

bjt.note: Direct coverage is limited to BJT computer-based listening, listening-and-reading, and reading tasks. Productive workplace interaction is not directly tested; BJT Can-Do findings are self-reported correlations.
bjt.noteJa: 直接対象は、BJTのCBTで扱う聴解・聴読解・読解課題に限ります。職場での産出的なやり取りは直接測定されず、BJT Can-Doの結果は自己報告による相関です。

mext.note: MEXT coverage indicates that a capability is developed in the represented native-school curriculum. It is a curriculum scope lens, not an exam measurement claim.
mext.noteJa: 文科省カバレッジは、対応する母語話者向け学校教育課程で能力が育成されることを示します。試験による測定を意味するものではありません。

capabilities.name: Kana and script decoding
capabilities.japaneseName: かなと文字の解読
capabilities.summary: Connect Japanese sounds and morae with hiragana, katakana, and other basic script conventions.
capabilities.summaryJa: 日本語の音や拍を、ひらがな・カタカナなどの基本的な文字体系と結びつけます。

capabilities.name: Orthography, punctuation, and notation
capabilities.japaneseName: 表記・句読点・記号
capabilities.summary: Read and apply Japanese spelling, punctuation, layout, quotation, and notation conventions.
capabilities.summaryJa: 日本語の綴り、句読点、配置、引用、表記上の慣習を読み取り、使い分けます。

capabilities.name: Handwriting and transcription
capabilities.japaneseName: 書写と転記
capabilities.summary: Produce legible Japanese by handwriting, copying, transcribing, typing, and controlling page layout.
capabilities.summaryJa: 手書き、書き写し、転記、入力、紙面構成を通して、読みやすい日本語を産出します。

capabilities.name: Kanji recognition and word-family reading
capabilities.japaneseName: 漢字認識と語族の読解
capabilities.summary: Use kanji components, readings, okurigana, compounds, and context to recognise written words.
capabilities.summaryJa: 漢字の構成、読み、送り仮名、熟語、文脈を用いて書かれた語を認識します。

capabilities.name: Productive kanji and orthographic control
capabilities.japaneseName: 漢字の産出と表記の調整
capabilities.summary: Write and edit kanji accurately while selecting notation appropriate to meaning, genre, and audience.
capabilities.summaryJa: 意味、ジャンル、読み手に合う表記を選びながら、漢字を正確に書き、推敲します。

capabilities.name: Pronunciation, morae, and prosody
capabilities.japaneseName: 発音・拍・韻律
capabilities.summary: Perceive and produce Japanese sound contrasts, mora timing, rhythm, pitch, and intonation.
capabilities.summaryJa: 日本語の音の対立、拍の長さ、リズム、ピッチ、イントネーションを知覚し、産出します。

capabilities.name: Listening comprehension and inference
capabilities.japaneseName: 聴解と推論
capabilities.summary: Follow spoken Japanese for gist, detail, intention, stance, reference, and implied meaning.
capabilities.summaryJa: 話し言葉の要点、詳細、意図、立場、指示対象、含意を聞き取ります。

capabilities.name: Vocabulary meaning and word relationships
capabilities.japaneseName: 語彙の意味と語の関係
capabilities.summary: Build lexical meaning through context, word formation, semantic relationships, and repeated use.
capabilities.summaryJa: 文脈、語形成、意味関係、繰り返しの使用を通して語彙の意味を広げます。

capabilities.name: Collocation, terminology, and lexical register
capabilities.japaneseName: コロケーション・専門語・語彙レジスター
capabilities.summary: Choose collocations, abstract and technical terms, idioms, and register-sensitive vocabulary.
capabilities.summaryJa: コロケーション、抽象語・専門語、慣用表現、場面に応じた語彙を選びます。

capabilities.name: Morphology and conjugation
capabilities.japaneseName: 形態論と活用
capabilities.summary: Control inflection, conjugation, tense, aspect, voice, and form selection in Japanese predicates.
capabilities.summaryJa: 日本語の述語における屈折、活用、時制、アスペクト、ヴォイス、形式選択を扱います。

capabilities.name: Particles and information structure
capabilities.japaneseName: 助詞と情報構造
capabilities.summary: Use particles and topic-focus choices to organise roles, reference, contrast, and information flow.
capabilities.summaryJa: 助詞と主題・焦点の選択によって、役割、指示、対比、情報の流れを組み立てます。

capabilities.name: Syntax and clause combining
capabilities.japaneseName: 統語と節の結合
capabilities.summary: Build, connect, embed, compress, and expand clauses while controlling scope and cohesion.
capabilities.summaryJa: 節を組み立て、接続し、埋め込み、圧縮・展開しながら、作用域と結束性を調整します。

capabilities.name: Grammar and language awareness
capabilities.japaneseName: 文法と言語への気づき
capabilities.summary: Notice, name, compare, and explain grammatical patterns and their effects in connected language.
capabilities.summaryJa: まとまりのある言語の中で文法パターンに気づき、名付け、比較し、その効果を説明します。

capabilities.name: Informational reading and main ideas
capabilities.japaneseName: 説明的文章の読解と要旨
capabilities.summary: Locate main ideas, details, structure, sequence, and explicit relationships in informational texts.
capabilities.summaryJa: 説明的文章から要旨、詳細、構成、順序、明示された関係を捉えます。

capabilities.name: Critical, integrated, and argumentative reading
capabilities.japaneseName: 批判的・統合的・論証的読解
capabilities.summary: Integrate sources and evaluate argument, evidence, framing, reliability, implication, and stance.
capabilities.summaryJa: 複数資料を統合し、論証、根拠、枠づけ、信頼性、含意、立場を評価します。

capabilities.name: Literary reading and interpretation
capabilities.japaneseName: 文学的文章の読解と解釈
capabilities.summary: Interpret narrative, character, viewpoint, imagery, symbolism, theme, and literary technique.
capabilities.summaryJa: 物語、人物、視点、イメージ、象徴、主題、表現技法を解釈します。

capabilities.name: Classical Japanese and kanbun
capabilities.japaneseName: 古典日本語と漢文
capabilities.summary: Read classical Japanese and kanbun through historical grammar, conventions, context, and reception.
capabilities.summaryJa: 歴史的文法、慣習、背景、受容を通して古文と漢文を読みます。

capabilities.name: Sentence, paragraph, and genre composition
capabilities.japaneseName: 文・段落・ジャンルの作文
capabilities.summary: Compose connected Japanese for description, narration, explanation, messages, and common genres.
capabilities.summaryJa: 描写、物語、説明、メッセージ、一般的なジャンルのまとまりある日本語を書きます。

capabilities.name: Argument, evidence, and synthesis writing
capabilities.japaneseName: 論証・根拠・統合の文章
capabilities.summary: Develop claims with reasons, evidence, counterarguments, source synthesis, and audience-aware structure.
capabilities.summaryJa: 理由、根拠、反論、資料の統合、読み手を意識した構成によって主張を展開します。

capabilities.name: Revision, editing, and proofreading
capabilities.japaneseName: 推敲・編集・校正
capabilities.summary: Revise content, cohesion, register, wording, notation, and correctness for purpose and audience.
capabilities.summaryJa: 目的と読み手に合わせて、内容、結束性、文体、語句、表記、正確さを推敲します。

capabilities.name: Everyday speaking and interaction
capabilities.japaneseName: 日常の発話とやり取り
capabilities.summary: Participate in everyday exchanges by asking, answering, describing, reporting, and managing turns.
capabilities.summaryJa: 質問、応答、描写、報告、発話順序の管理によって日常のやり取りに参加します。

capabilities.name: Interaction repair and negotiation
capabilities.japaneseName: やり取りの修復と交渉
capabilities.summary: Clarify, confirm, soften, refuse, repair misunderstanding, and negotiate alternatives in interaction.
capabilities.summaryJa: やり取りの中で明確化、確認、緩和、断り、誤解の修復、代案の交渉を行います。

capabilities.name: Discussion, facilitation, and debate
capabilities.japaneseName: 話し合い・進行・討論
capabilities.summary: Develop and evaluate positions, evidence, disagreement, consensus, and group decisions in discussion.
capabilities.summaryJa: 話し合いの中で立場、根拠、意見の相違、合意、集団の決定を展開し、評価します。

capabilities.name: Presentation and public speaking
capabilities.japaneseName: 発表と公的な話し方
capabilities.summary: Plan and deliver structured spoken presentations while using evidence, media, and audience feedback.
capabilities.summaryJa: 根拠、メディア、聞き手の反応を用いながら、構成された発表を計画し、実施します。

capabilities.name: Pragmatics, politeness, and register
capabilities.japaneseName: 語用論・丁寧さ・レジスター
capabilities.summary: Adapt implication, politeness, honorifics, stance, and register to relationships, roles, and situations.
capabilities.summaryJa: 人間関係、役割、状況に応じて、含意、丁寧さ、敬語、立場、レジスターを調整します。

capabilities.name: Language culture, history, and variation
capabilities.japaneseName: 言語文化・歴史・変異
capabilities.summary: Understand dialect, generational and historical change, language culture, genre, and social variation.
capabilities.summaryJa: 方言、世代差・歴史的変化、言語文化、ジャンル、社会的変異を理解します。

capabilities.name: Research, sources, and information use
capabilities.japaneseName: 探究・資料・情報活用
capabilities.summary: Find, organise, evaluate, quote, compare, and synthesise information from multiple sources.
capabilities.summaryJa: 複数の資料から情報を探し、整理し、評価し、引用し、比較し、統合します。

capabilities.name: Media and digital literacy
capabilities.japaneseName: メディア・デジタルリテラシー
capabilities.summary: Navigate, interpret, evaluate, and design messages across digital, visual, data, and media forms.
capabilities.summaryJa: デジタル、視覚、データ、メディアの形式を横断して情報を読み、評価し、表現を設計します。

capabilities.name: Learning, lookup, and repair strategies
capabilities.japaneseName: 学習・検索・修復の方略
capabilities.summary: Use lookup, note-taking, rehearsal, memory, feedback, error analysis, and targeted review strategies.
capabilities.summaryJa: 検索、メモ、反復、記憶、フィードバック、誤り分析、的を絞った復習の方略を使います。

capabilities.name: Self-assessment and learning transfer
capabilities.japaneseName: 自己評価と学習の転移
capabilities.summary: Evaluate evidence of growth, identify gaps, set goals, and transfer strategies across tasks and contexts.
capabilities.summaryJa: 成長の証拠を評価し、課題を特定し、目標を定め、方略を別の課題や文脈へ転移します。

capabilities.name: Workplace documents and decisions
capabilities.japaneseName: 職場文書と意思決定
capabilities.summary: Read and produce workplace messages, forms, reports, minutes, proposals, briefs, and decision records.
capabilities.summaryJa: 職場のメッセージ、帳票、報告書、議事録、提案書、要約、意思決定記録を読み書きします。

capabilities.name: Workplace interaction and negotiation
capabilities.japaneseName: 職場のやり取りと交渉
capabilities.summary: Coordinate roles, schedules, clients, meetings, risk, escalation, and negotiation in workplace Japanese.
capabilities.summaryJa: 職場日本語で役割、予定、顧客、会議、リスク、エスカレーション、交渉を調整します。

capabilities.name: Intercultural communication and mediation
capabilities.japaneseName: 異文化間コミュニケーションと仲介
capabilities.summary: Interpret assumptions, expectations, face, norms, and perspectives across cultural and institutional contexts.
capabilities.summaryJa: 文化的・制度的な文脈を横断して、前提、期待、フェイス、規範、視点を読み取り、仲介します。
